title: Behavioral Evidence, Values, Equity, and Accessible Hiring · Hiring Decision Lens: Values Evidence
summary: A candidate memorizes heroic stories, erases collaborators, blames others, performs culture fit, and assumes every hiring task is equally accessible or lawful everywhere. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the values evidence increment in behavioral evidence and access response bank. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.
Describe disagreement, feedback, error, repair, shared credit, power, and changed behavior without blame or false harmony.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence
steps.instruction:
theory case — Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Values Evidence contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse. For Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence, keep Values Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Values Evidence condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

hints: For Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Values Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Matching personality with a team is objective evidence of culture fit.

options.text: Matching personality with a team is objective evidence of culture fit. That claim fails the predict values evidence boundary for Values Evidence.

For predict values evidence, apply Values Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the behavioral evidence and access response bank trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Values Evidence for behavioral evidence and access response bank.

Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Values Evidence while producing behavioral evidence and access response bank.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse. A defensible solution applies Values Evidence, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to behavioral evidence and access response bank.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-values-evidence — Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
focus: career-values-evidence
decision-evidence: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Matching personality with a team is objective evidence of culture fit. This fails the Values Evidence contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers (Worker resource published 2024; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.

steps.title: Build Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a career-values-evidence-qv83rb: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

For Build Values Evidence · Theory Values Evidence, keep Values Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

stimulus.title: Values Evidence failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Matching personality with a team is objective evidence of culture fit.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Values Evidence, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

Keep the Values Evidence artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the values evidence defect evidence boundary for Values Evidence.

For repair the values evidence defect, apply Values Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the behavioral evidence and access response bank trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Values Evidence for behavioral evidence and access response bank.

steps.title: Defend the Values Evidence model · Theory Values Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Values Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Memorized heroic stories erase collaborators, blame a former team, treat culture fit as objective, and presume every assessment is equally accessible. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.

Evidence target: Defend the Values Evidence model · Theory Values Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Values Evidence through the concrete behavioral evidence and access response bank case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Values Evidence model · Theory Values Evidence, keep Values Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test stated organizational values with recent behavior, incentives, tradeoffs, failure response, affected people, and employee recourse.
